metadata.title: Custom App & Web Development Ireland | We Make IT
metadata.description: Turn your idea into an app or website. Irish-based, 15+ years experience, fixed price. Free first consultation. No tech knowledge needed.
metadata.ogTitle: Custom App & Web Development Ireland | We Make IT
metadata.ogDescription: Got a business idea? We help you validate it, plan it, and build it. No tech knowledge needed. Free first consultation.

hero.subtitle: Got a business idea? We help you turn it into a real app or website. No tech knowledge needed. One team, one price, no surprises.
hero.springSale: Spring Sale: 40% off for new clients. Limited spots available.

items.label: Years Building Apps and Websites
items.ariaLabel: 15 plus years building apps and websites

items.label: First Consultation. No Commitment.
items.ariaLabel: Free first consultation with no commitment required

items.label: Fixed Price. No Hidden Extras.
items.ariaLabel: One fixed price with no hidden extras

items.label: Tech Knowledge Required From You
items.ariaLabel: Zero technical knowledge required from you

services.heading: App and website development services for your business
services.subheading: From idea validation and prototyping, to mobile app development, web applications, IT consulting, and ongoing support. Everything under one roof.

items.title: Custom App Development
items.description: We design and build custom applications tailored to exactly how your business works. No off-the-shelf compromises. Just the right tool, built for you.

items.title: Idea Validation and MVP
items.description: Not sure if your idea will work? We help you validate it before spending a penny on a full build. We then create a Minimum Viable Product (MVP) so you can test it with real users fast.

items.title: UX Research
items.description: Already have a product or prototype? As a UI UX design agency, we research how real people use it, find what is confusing or broken, and give you a clear, prioritised list of improvements.

items.title: App Prototype
items.description: Before committing to a full build, we create an interactive prototype of your app. You can click through it, test it with users, and get investor feedback.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: We build mobile apps that work on both iOS and Android from a single codebase, keeping costs down without compromising on look or feel.

items.title: Web Application Development
items.description: Need something more powerful than a website? We build web apps: dashboards, booking systems, portals, marketplaces. If you can imagine it, we can build it.

items.title: Accessibility Audits
items.description: EU law now requires digital products to be accessible to people with disabilities. We audit your existing app or website and fix what needs fixing.

items.title: Software Consultancy
items.description: Not sure what to build, which technology to choose, or whether your idea is viable? Our software consultancy and app development consulting service gives you honest, jargon-free answers.

items.title: Discovery Workshops
items.description: A structured session where we work with you to map out your idea, define what your users need, and agree on the scope before a single line of code is written.

items.title: Maintenance and Support
items.description: Already have an app that needs looking after? We take on ongoing support, fix bugs, add new features, and keep things running smoothly.

founder.opening: I am just like you, an everyday user juggling countless apps and tools. And, like many of you, my patience for clunky or confusing software is very short. I love intuitive experiences, the kind where everything simply makes sense. But the truth is that most apps still do not feel that way.
founder.name: My name is Lana.
founder.identity: A frustrated user who became a creative innovator, a technical consultant, and the founder of We Make IT.
founder.bio: For more than eight years, I have worked in web development across large companies and small teams. My focus has always been frontend engineering, Design Systems, and Accessibility. I am also a certified UX designer who thrives on creating intuitive interfaces and inclusive experiences. I am supported by a team of brilliant full-stack engineers with over fifteen years of experience. Together, We Make IT Happen.
founder.passion: It took years of reflection to understand this, but solving usability problems is my true passion. I care deeply about inclusive and accessible software because no one should be left behind. People are different. Needs are different. Yet we all deserve to move through our digital lives with as little frustration as possible. Applications shape our everyday experience, whether we like it or not. My mission is to help entrepreneurs like you create products that feel effortless for your customers.
founder.differenceHeading: So what makes our services different?
founder.differenceHighlight: A genuine obsession with problem solving.
founder.differenceText: If you have a problem, we will find the solution. Clear, direct, and without unnecessary complications.
founder.quote: When your business solves a real problem for real people, that is where success begins.
founder.quoteFooter: And we know how to help you reach that point.
founder.callout: Share your idea in the form below to get a free quote. Your frustration-free product starts here.
founder.imgAlt: Lana, founder of We Make IT

about.body1: We Make IT is a small team of experienced engineers based in Ireland. We work with entrepreneurs, small businesses, and first-time founders who have a great idea but are not sure how to get it built.
about.body2: You do not need to know anything about technology. We will have a free, no-pressure conversation with you, help you figure out what you actually need, and give you an honest plan and price.
about.body3: We have helped businesses across Ireland and Europe build apps, websites, and digital platforms from scratch. We have worked at big tech companies and know what good looks like. Now we bring that experience to small teams and startups.
about.tagline: Wherever you are, if you have an idea, we would love to hear it.
about.languageNote: By the way, we also speak

values.title: We Speak Plain English
values.description: No jargon, no confusion. We explain everything in a way that makes sense, and we never make you feel bad for asking questions.

values.title: Big-Company Experience, Small-Team Feel
values.description: We have 15+ years of experience building apps for large companies. Now we bring that same quality to smaller projects, with the attention and care a big agency cannot offer.

process.subheading: You do not need to be technical to get started. Just tell us your idea and we will take it from there.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Idea
steps.description: Fill in our short form below and describe your idea in plain words. No technical knowledge needed.

steps.title: We Send You a Quote
steps.description: We review your idea and send you a clear email with the quote. No vague estimates, just a straight answer.

steps.title: We Book a Call
steps.description: If you are happy to proceed, we send you a calendar to pick a date for a video or in-person call.

steps.title: We Shake Hands
steps.description: When you are ready to start, we sign a simple contract to get everything in writing.

steps.title: We Start the Work
steps.description: You pay the deposit and we get building. Easy as that.

ctaStrip.heading: Not sure if your idea is ready?
ctaStrip.body1: That is exactly when to talk to us. We offer free idea validation consultations. No commitment, no jargon, just an honest conversation.
ctaStrip.body2: We have in-house experience in Design Thinking and Minimum Viable Product design. We can help you figure out whether your idea can become a profitable business, or whether it is better to refine it first before spending money on development.

contact.heading: Tell Us Your Idea
contact.body: Fill in the form and describe your idea in your own words. There are no wrong answers. We will get back to you quickly to arrange a free chat and help you figure out the best path forward.
contact.springSaleBody: 40% off for new clients this spring. Submit your request now and lock in the discounted rate.
contact.springSaleBeat: Already have a quote from another company?
contact.springSaleBeatHighlight: Send it to us and we will beat it.

success.generalBody: Thanks for getting in touch. We will get back to you shortly.
success.quoteBody: Thanks for reaching out. We will review your request and get back to you quickly with a quote.

footer.tagline: We help entrepreneurs and small businesses turn their ideas into real apps and websites. Based in Ireland, working globally.
footer.copyright: We Make IT Sole Trader company registered in Ireland.
footer.languageNote: By the way, we also speak Italiano and Русский.

cookieBanner.text: We use strictly necessary cookies to keep the site working. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies without your consent.
